town_motto: Everyone knows your secrets by lunch, but they bring pie about it.
incidents: a rumor about a haunted casserole dish escapes into the market
the mayor's goose steals someone's bouquet again
a toddler wins an accordion duel by accident
a suspiciously perfect pie sparks allegations of sorcery
three cousins claim ownership of the same lucky spoon

locations.name: Clocktower Plaza
locations.description: The town square where gossip arrives before the pigeons do.

locations.name: Sigh & Sip Tea House
locations.description: A velvet tea room where confessions happen over cinnamon foam.

locations.name: Turnip Jubilee Market
locations.description: A market where vegetables are sold, judged, and occasionally applauded.

locations.name: Whisper Fern Garden
locations.description: A moonlit garden where people practice forgiveness and suspiciously elegant flirting.
locations.mood: soft, fragrant, and a little haunted

locations.name: Town Hall of Mildly Alarming Decisions
locations.description: Where committees meet and somehow always invent new formal hats.

locations.name: Moonbucket Riverbank
locations.description: A dreamy bank with fireflies, reeds, and at least one dramatic confession per week.
